'''zhagoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qin|qin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qin|qin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhagoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhægeyeth|zhægeyeth]] || [[word:zhægeyej|zhægeyej]] || [[word:zhægeyesh|zhægeyesh]] || [[word:zhægeye|zhægeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagogoyoth|zhagogoyoth]] || [[word:zhagogoyoj|zhagogoyoj]] || [[word:zhagogoyosh|zhagogoyosh]] || [[word:zhagogoyo|zhagogoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagoyoth|zhagoyoth]] || [[word:zhagoyoj|zhagoyoj]] || [[word:zhagoyosh|zhagoyosh]] || [[word:zhagoyo|zhagoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagofyoth|zhagofyoth]] || [[word:zhagofyoj|zhagofyoj]] || [[word:zhagofyosh|zhagofyosh]] || [[word:zhagofyof|zhagofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhagoyotho|zhagoyotho]] || [[word:zhagoyojo|zhagoyojo]] || [[word:zhagoyosho|zhagoyosho]] || [[word:zhagoyoko|zhagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhagoyoth|zhagoyoth]] || [[word:zhagoyoj|zhagoyoj]] || [[word:zhagoyosh|zhagoyosh]] || [[word:zhagoyo|zhagoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhagoyothol|zhagoyothol]] || [[word:zhagoyojol|zhagoyojol]] || [[word:zhagoyoshol|zhagoyoshol]] || [[word:zhagoyokol|zhagoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhagoyothotho|zhagoyothotho]] || [[word:zhagoyojojo|zhagoyojojo]] || [[word:zhagoyoshosho|zhagoyoshosho]] || [[word:zhagoyoko|zhagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhagoyothon|zhagoyothon]] || [[word:zhagoyojon|zhagoyojon]] || [[word:zhagoyoshon|zhagoyoshon]] || [[word:zhagoyokon|zhagoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhagoyothoro|zhagoyothoro]] || [[word:zhagoyojoro|zhagoyojoro]] || [[word:zhagoyoshoro|zhagoyoshoro]] || [[word:zhagoyokoro|zhagoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
